name: 短剑（★） | 多普勒
descriptionEn: Historically a focal point of contention and even regulation, this Italian-style stiletto switchblade knife features a spring-loaded blade that can be deployed almost instantly with the push of a release catch. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated. Getting lost in its color can prove fatal
descriptionZh: 作为历史上舆论乃至法规的讨论焦点，这把配备着弹簧加压刀刃的意大利短剑可以在按下开关的瞬间弹出到位。 这把武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料画上的仿大理石纹进行了涂装，并且外表裹上了糖衣。 被其外表所迷惑后果会很严重
